text: Changed auth/session.ts to rotate refresh tokens every 15 minutes because replay risk increased after the mobile login rollout. The migration keeps old tokens valid for 24 hours to avoid forcing active users out during deploy.

label: reviewed
text: Switched OrderService.calculateTotal() from BigDecimal.HALF_UP to HALF_EVEN rounding because we saw 0.3% revenue drift on 14k invoices last quarter. Added regression test in OrderServiceTest.java covering the 7 edge cases from the accounting audit.

label: reviewed
text: Replaced the hand-rolled CSV parser in etl/ingest.py with pandas.read_csv because three customer files had mixed encodings (UTF-8 with BOM, Latin-1) that broke row 4,221 in the Acme dataset. Latency went from 8.3s to 2.1s on the 120 MB test file.

label: reviewed
text: Removed the retry-on-5xx logic in api/client.go after the March incident where a 503 loop consumed 94% of the worker pool for 11 minutes. Now we circuit-break after 3 failures and alert #ops-oncall. Tradeoff: transient blips will surface faster to users, but we avoid cascading outages.

label: reviewed
text: Added rate limiting to /api/v2/search because the Grafana dashboard showed 3 customers sending 400+ rps, which caused p99 to spike from 120ms to 2.8s. Set limit at 60 rps per API key with a 429 response and Retry-After header.

label: reviewed
text: Pinned the OpenSSL dependency to 3.1.4 after CVE-2024-0727 was disclosed. The vulnerability allows memory corruption via crafted PKCS12 files. We don't process user-uploaded PKCS12, but pinning prevents transitive exposure through our certificate rotation job.

label: reviewed
text: To enable rate limiting, add `RATE_LIMIT_RPS=50` to your `.env` file and restart the gateway. The limiter uses a sliding-window counter backed by Redis; if Redis is unavailable, it falls back to in-memory with a 60-second TTL. Example: `curl -H 'X-Api-Key: test' http://localhost:8080/v1/score` should return 429 after 50 requests in one second.

label: reviewed
text: Step 1: Run `npm run db:migrate` to create the `user_sessions` table. Step 2: Set `SESSION_SECRET` in your environment — the value must be at least 32 characters. Step 3: Restart the server. If you see error TS-4012 in the logs, the secret is too short. See `config/session.ts` lines 14-28 for the validation logic.

label: reviewed
text:
The webhook payload includes `event_type`, `timestamp_ms`, and `payload`. For `order.completed` events, `payload.total_cents` is an integer (not float) to avoid floating-point rounding. Example payload:
```json
{"event_type": "order.completed", "timestamp_ms": 1716422400000, "payload": {"order_id": "ORD-9281", "total_cents": 4999}}
```

label: reviewed
text: To add a custom detector, create a new file in `slopguard/detectors/` that exports a function matching `def my_signal(text: str) -> SignalResult`. Register it in `detectors/__init__.py` by appending to the `DOMAIN_REGISTRY` dict. Run `pytest tests/test_custom_detector.py` to verify. Note: weights above 2.0 will be clamped to 2.0 by the scoring engine.

label: reviewed
text: Known issue: the `created_at` column on `audit_logs` is not indexed. Queries filtering by date range will full-scan on tables larger than ~500k rows. Workaround: add `CREATE INDEX idx_audit_created ON audit_logs(created_at)` before running the reporting job. Fix planned for v2.4.

label: reviewed
text: The retry mechanism uses exponential backoff starting at 200ms, doubling up to a cap of 5 seconds, with jitter of ±50ms. After 5 consecutive failures, the circuit breaker opens for 30 seconds. During this window, all requests to that upstream return a cached 503. Monitor via the `/health/dependencies` endpoint.

text: Incident postmortem: the 3-hour outage on May 12 was caused by a DNS TTL misconfiguration. The CNAME record for api.acme.com had a 1-second TTL instead of 300 seconds, which caused Route53 to throttle lookups. Fix: bumped TTL to 60s as a compromise between failover speed and lookup volume.

text: PostgreSQL 16 introduced incremental backup support, reducing full backup time by 40-60% for databases over 500 GB. In our tests on a 1.2 TB instance, weekly backup windows shrank from 4 hours to 90 minutes. The feature requires wal_level=replica and a base backup taken with pg_basebackup --incremental.

text: We compared 3 CDN providers over 90 days across 12 PoPs. Cloudflare delivered a median TTFB of 42ms vs Fastly at 38ms and AWS CloudFront at 61ms. text: Following the protocol of Chen et al. (2023), we fine-tuned LLaMA-2-7B on 12,400 instruction-response pairs using LoRA (rank=16, alpha=32). text: We recruited 142 participants (68 female, 71 male, 3 non-binary; mean age 34.2, SD=8.7) through Prolific. Each participant completed 40 trials in a within-subjects design. text: Our approach may not generalize to low-resource languages, as the training data contained fewer than 500 examples for 14 of the 28 languages tested. Future work should investigate data augmentation strategies such as back-translation (Sennrich et al., 2016).
